'''Raiss''' was the [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Linrec]] arranged the wedding of his daughter [[Cressis Linrec|Cressis]] to Raiss as a means to increase his own influence. However, disliking Raiss, Cressis ran away with local [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Jondrell Inx]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Two for the Price of One|book=Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters}} {{1stm}}
